message:
test(fj-conformance): add 26 oracle tests for BitcastConvertType and ReducePrecision

Adds conformance tests for two more JAX primitives:
- BitcastConvertType: 12 tests for bit-pattern reinterpretation (i64<->f64, u32<->f32)
- ReducePrecision: 14 tests for exponent/mantissa bit truncation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
